zh.lifeSummary: 當Gerard Ufflete於大約1295年出生在英國英格蘭林可爾史爾貝金哈姆時，他的父親John Ufflete41歲，母親Loretta De Furnival36歲。他於大約1330年與Ada結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他去世於1363年1月13日在英國越可爾武瑟福利特享年69歲，埋葬在英國越可爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Gerard Ufflete于大约1295年出生在英国英格兰林可爾史爾貝金哈姆时，他的父亲John Ufflete41岁，母亲Loretta De Furnival36岁。他于大约1330年与Ada结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。他去世于1363年1月13日在英国越可爾武瑟福利特享年69岁，埋葬在英国越可爾。

nameMeanings.name: Gerard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Old French name of Germanic (Frankish) origin, introduced to Britain by the Normans. It is derived from gār, gēr ‘spear’ + hard ‘brave, hardy, strong’. In the later Middle Ages this was a more common name than Gerald , with which it was sometimes confused. Nowadays it is less common, surviving mainly among Roman Catholics, in honour of the many saints of this name.

variants.name: Gerrard
meanings: Variant spelling of   Gerard  , in part from the surname derived from the given name in the Middle Ages.

variants.name: Jerrard
meanings: Rare variant spelling of   Gerard  , probably influenced by the form of the modern surname, if not a transferred use.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Gerard Ufflete was born about 1295, in Beckingham, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, John Ufflete, was 41 and his mother, Loretta De Furnival, was 36. He married Ada about 1330. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He died on 13 January 1363, in Ousefleet, Yorkshire, England, at the age of 69, and was buried in Yorkshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Gerard Ufflete est né environ 1295, à Beckingham, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, John Ufflete, avait 41 ans et sa mère, Loretta De Furnival, avait 36 ans. Il a épousé Ada environ 1330. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé le 13 janvier 1363, à Ousefleet, Everwyck, Angleterre, à l’âge de 69 ans, et a été enterré à Everwyck, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Gerard Ufflete um 1295 in Beckingham, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater John Ufflete 41 und seine Mutter Loretta De Furnival 36. Er hat um 1330 Ada geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb am 13. Januar 1363 im Alter von 69 Jahren in Ousefleet, Yorkshire, England und wurde in Yorkshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Gerard Ufflete è nato il circa 1295 nel Beckingham, Lincolnshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, John Ufflete, aveva 41 anni e il suo madre, Loretta De Furnival, aveva 36 anni. Lui sposato Ada circa 1330. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì il 13 gennaio 1363, nel Ousefleet, Yorkshire, England, all'età di 69 anni, e fu sepolto a Yorkshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Gerard Uffleteが約1295年にイギリスイギリスリンコルンシュアイアベクインガムで生まれた時，父John Uffleteは41歳，母Loretta De Furnivalは36歳であった。約1330年にAdaと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼は1363年1月13日にイギリスヨークシュアイアウセフリートで69歳で死去し，イギリスヨークシュアイアにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Gerard Ufflete(이)가 대략 1295년 영국 잉글랜드 링코실르 베킨그함에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Ufflete(은)는 41세였고, 그의 어머니 Loretta De Furnival(은)는 36세였다. 그는 대략 1330년 Ada(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1363년 1월 13일 영국 요르크실르 우세플릿에서 69세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 요르크실르에 묻혔다.

mn.Beckingham & Sutton, Lincolnshire, Engla: Beckingham, Lindon, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Gerard Ufflete nasceu aproximadamente 1295, em Beckingham, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, John Ufflete, tinha 41 anos e sua mãe, Loretta De Furnival, tinha 36 anos. Ele casou-se com Ada aproximadamente 1330. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ele faleceu em 13 de janeiro de 1363, em Ousefleet, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, com 69 anos, e foi sepultado em Yorkshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Gerard Ufflete родился около 1295 г. в местности беккингхам, линколншир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени John Ufflete было 41 год, а матери, которую звали Loretta De Furnival, 36. Он женился на женщине по имени Ada около 1330 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер 13 января 1363 г. в местности оусефлит, еркшир, Англия в возрасте 69 лет и был похоронен в местности еркшир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Gerard Ufflete nació aproximadamente 1295, en Beckingham, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, John Ufflete, tenía 41 años y su mamá, Loretta De Furnival, tenía 36 años. Se casó con Ada aproximadamente 1330. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió el 13 de enero de 1363, en Ousefleet, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 69 años, y fue sepultado en Yorkshire, Inglaterra.
